name: drift_review_summary
primary_question: What named drift signals and explicit review decision are represented by the committed 8Dionysus cadence examples without replacing rollout or campaign truth?
derivation_rule: derive one committed reference drift-review summary from the 8Dionysus rollout-campaign, drift-review, and rollback-followthrough examples while keeping rollback readiness descriptive only
authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned drift reviews, campaign windows, and rollback decisions.
